product_information.description:
Ingrediënten
INGREDIENTS: Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Lactic Acid, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Chloride, Citric Acid, Coco-Glucoside, Sodium Benzoate, Sodium Hydroxide, Parfum, Glycol Distearate, Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Glyceryl Oleate, Glyceryl Stearate, Trisodium Ethylenediamine Disuccinate, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice Powder, Hexyl Cinnamal, CI 42090, CI 47005.
